project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: CSRF Token, FCM Push Token, User Account Data
project_privacy_data_flows.description: User logs out of Wikipedia. Triggers: FCM push token unsubscription from server, server-side session invalidation via postLogout, Android AccountManager account removal, local cookie store clearing, and deletion of all local notification data.

flow_steps.code: fun logOut() { MainScope().launch(CoroutineExceptionHandler { _, t -> L.e(t) }) { ServiceFactory.get(wikiSite).getToken().query?.csrfToken()?.let { token -> WikipediaFirebaseMessagingService.unsubscribePushToken(token, Prefs.pushNotificationToken); ServiceFactory.get(wikiSite).postLogout(token) } } }
flow_steps.details: User triggers logout. CSRF token acquired from server, then used to unsubscribe FCM push token and call postLogout API.

flow_steps.code: @FormUrlEncoded @POST(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=logout") suspend fun postLogout(@Field("token") token: String): MwPostResponse
flow_steps.details: CSRF token sent to MediaWiki API to invalidate server-side session.

flow_steps.code: @FormUrlEncoded @POST(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=echopushsubscriptions&command=delete&provider=fcm") suspend fun unsubscribePush(@Field("token") csrfToken: String, @Field("providertoken") providerToken: String)
flow_steps.details: FCM push notification token unregistered from Wikipedia Echo service.

flow_steps.code: fun resetAfterLogOut() { AccountUtil.removeAccount(); Prefs.isPushNotificationTokenSubscribed = false; Prefs.pushNotificationTokenOld = ""; SharedPreferenceCookieManager.instance.clearAllCookies(); AppDatabase.instance.notificationDao().deleteAll(); Prefs.impactLastResponseBody = emptyMap(); Prefs.yearInReviewModelData = emptyMap() }
flow_steps.details: Local state cleared: Android AccountManager account removed, all cookies cleared, notification database deleted, impact and Year-in-Review cached data cleared.
User account (including stored password) removed from Android AccountManager.
All authentication and session cookies removed from persistent storage.
